meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't scale projects (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Template to Scale SaaS Projects
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with project scalability. Use this expert Antigravity template and Claude Code workflow to ship professional-grade SaaS apps faster than ever.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template solves scalability bottlenecks by standardizing your architecture, enforcing strict modularity, and automating boilerplate. By integrating Claude Code, you transform your development workflow from manual coding to intelligent orchestration, allowing you to ship production-ready, client-facing features in a fraction of the time.
content.intro:
You’re trapped in the 'custom-build cycle.' Every new client project feels like starting from scratch, fighting the same architectural fires and spending hours on redundant boilerplate. Your talent is being drained by the friction of scaling, turning what should be a lucrative freelance career into a repetitive, manual grind.

But the best builders don't build from zero—they build from leverage. The Antigravity project template is the industry-standard framework designed to eliminate the 'blank canvas' problem. By combining this modular architecture with the raw power of Claude Code, you shift from being a coder to an AI-assisted architect, delivering enterprise-grade performance with the speed of a solo developer.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Standardize your project structure to ensure modularity. This step eliminates folder-structure anxiety and sets up the dependency injection patterns required for scalable SaaS.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project using the Antigravity template with Next.js 15, Tailwind, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Configure Domain-Driven Modules
steps.description: Break your application into isolated domains to prevent spaghetti code. This makes testing and feature updates painless as your client's requirements evolve.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a new domain module for 'UserAuthentication' using the Antigravity standard schema and service pattern.

steps.title: Automate API Contract Enforcement
steps.description: Synchronize your frontend and backend types automatically. This prevents the classic 'schema mismatch' bugs that plague scaling projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Sync the API layer with the database schema and generate TypeScript interfaces for all new endpoints.

steps.title: Deploy the Middleware Guardrails
steps.description: Implement authentication and rate-limiting middleware globally. This ensures your project is production-ready from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add standard Antigravity middleware for JWT validation and global rate limiting to all protected routes.

steps.title: Execute Automated Integration Testing
steps.description: Run a comprehensive suite of tests to verify the integrity of your new features before shipping to the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the full Antigravity test suite and provide a summary report on any architectural regressions.

pro_tips: Always store your domain logic in the /lib/modules folder to keep business rules separate from UI components.
Use Claude Code to 'refactor-by-exception' by feeding it your error logs directly from the terminal.
Implement a 'Feature Flag' system using the Antigravity config store to toggle client features without deploying new code.
Treat your project template as a living product; version control your 'antigravity.config.json' to keep your stack updated.
Leverage the Antigravity CLI to generate documentation alongside code, keeping your project handover professional and automated.
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, iterate on your core module, perform a final audit using the Claude Code 'review' command, and push your first production build to Vercel.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for today and start building for scale. Leverage the tools that elite freelancers use to dominate their markets. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
